name: First Service Bank
description_short: First Service Bank is a community bank operating across 11 Arkansas locations since 1962, offering checking, savings, money market, and loan products with online and mobile banking.
description_long: First Service Bank was established in 1962 and has grown to serve eleven communities across Arkansas, including Conway, Clinton, Dermott, Flippin, Greenbrier, Little Rock, Maumelle, Mountain View, Saline County, Shirley, and Yellville. The bank positions itself as a traditional community bank with emphasis on personal relationships and local service. The company offers a full range of consumer banking products including checking accounts, savings accounts, personal money market accounts, and loans for both personal and business purposes. They provide online banking and a mobile app to serve customers who cannot visit physical locations during business hours. First Service Bank distinguishes itself through its long operational history, multi-location physical presence across Arkansas, and emphasis on customer service quality. Customer reviews highlight staff recognition, patience, and personalized assistance, particularly in the mortgage department. The bank's Personal Premier Money Market Account features tiered variable APY rates (4.64% on balances up to $20,000 as of 12-1-25) with a $5 monthly service charge waived for eStatements enrollment. However, as a regional bank, First Service Bank has limited geographic reach compared to national institutions, and their product offerings appear more traditional rather than specialized in niche lending or technology-forward services. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal Premier Money Market Account with tiered variable APY
pros: Tiered money market account with competitive rates up to 4.64% APY on lower balances (up to $20,000)
11 physical locations across Arkansas for in-person banking and relationship-based service
62+ years of operational history and established local presence since 1962
Service charge waived on money market accounts when enrolled in eStatements
Online banking and mobile app for convenient account management
Dedicated mortgage department noted for exceptional customer service in reviews
Toll-free after-hours debit card support line (1-800-307-7309)
cons: $5 monthly service charge on money market accounts (unless eStatements enrolled)
Tiered APY rates decline significantly on larger balances (1.00% APY on balances over $250,000)
Limited geographic footprint restricted to Arkansas communities only
Website content lacks detailed information on loan terms, APR ranges, or specific product features
No mention of account opening bonuses, promotional rates, or special offers beyond standard products
best_for: Arkansas residents seeking community banking with personal relationships and local branch access
Customers with $5,000-$20,000 in savings looking for competitive money market rates
Borrowers needing mortgage or business loans who prefer face-to-face consultation
diagnosis: First Service Bank is best for Arkansas residents who value community banking, personal relationships, and physical branch access, and who have savings under $20,000 to take advantage of their competitive money market rates. The main caveat is geographic limitation to Arkansas and lack of specialized lending products or technology-forward features that appeal to non-traditional banking customers.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
